form.formComment: Last start finished last over 520m at this track beaten 13 lengths (30.63) behind Showman Baz in a Grade 5 on March 21. Coming out of a very strong form race. Expected to go well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished last over 520m at this track beaten 13 lengths (30.63) behind Showman Baz in a Grade 5 on March 21. Coming out of a very strong form race. Expected to go well.

form.formComment: Inside draw could be an advantage. Last start finished fourth in a Grade 5 on April 6 over 520m at Nowra behind She's A Trunkey, beaten 13 lengths (30.74). Capable of a good showing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Inside draw could be an advantage. Last start finished fourth in a Grade 5 on April 6 over 520m at Nowra behind She's A Trunkey, beaten 13 lengths (30.74). Capable of a good showing.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at Bulli over 400m in 22.66. Followed that up with a minor placing over 450m at Maitland at Grade 5 five days ago. Top-three hope with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back at Bulli over 400m in 22.66. Followed that up with a minor placing over 450m at Maitland at Grade 5 five days ago. Top-three hope with the right run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for room approaching the 1st turn.
Came together and conceded ground on the turn out of the back straight.

form.formComment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest at big odds finishing third (30.20) at Nowra. Will need a little luck early from the draw. Looks to have the job ahead.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest at big odds finishing third (30.20) at Nowra. Will need a little luck early from the draw. Looks to have the job ahead.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (31.03) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing eighth and beaten 18 lengths. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Looks a place chance at best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (31.03) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing eighth and beaten 18 lengths. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Looks a place chance at best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels galloped on entering the first turn, stumbled and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Unplaced in four tries at this track. Last start 5th over 630m at Nowra. Safely held last time and looking to others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Unplaced in four tries at this track. Last start 5th over 630m at Nowra. Safely held last time and looking to others.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly and was very slow to begin.
Entering the first turn, checked off heels.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 1.5 lengths at Maitland over 400m (22.59) beating Total Texas in Grade 5 on April 13. Can make it back to back wins.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to win by 1.5 lengths at Maitland over 400m (22.59) beating Total Texas in Grade 5 on April 13. Can make it back to back wins.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th over 350m at Goulburn beaten 6 lengths (20.51) behind Ray Finkle in a Grade 5 on April 10. Some good form is emerging from that last run. Expected to prove hard to beat.
